non_blocking_issues: Cosmetic: Accept/Trust arm dedented inconsistently vs the when-arm (compiles; formatter pass).
A deferring job (return@launch) still fires onSettled(false) via the outer finally while the pending job may yet succeed; benign (refresh-path callers no-op on false) but semantically inaccurate.
Single-flight of the pending-set is atomic only under the documented main-dispatcher contract; a background-dispatcher caller would reintroduce a TOCTOU. Assumption is load-bearing but documented.
Editor Test-Connection TOFU bypass accepted for 0.7.0 as usability; recommend a one-line confirmation it merely fails (no trust-all) rather than offering trust.
notes: round-3 (terminal). Traced concurrency end-to-end in the live file. Round-2 non-blocking concurrency note fully closed: loop-top (241) + pre-terminal (394) guards mean a 2nd testConnection launched before pending was set now defers instead of probing + writing Disconnected under the open dialog. Only the pending job can write Disconnected (Cancel); atomic pending-set on main (no suspension between check 322 and set 328) prevents double-capture/orphaned-deferred. HttpImageHolder.updateSsl is a strict tightening (SystemDefault→TofuPinned), no bypass. No silent-trust / client-cert-leak / pin-bypass. clearTofuPin-no-UI + editor-Test bypass remain acceptable usability gaps for 0.7.0 (SSH-analogous). Terminal review: pass.
